ogTitle: Wandearah West vs Wangary: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wandearah West and Wangary.
heading: Wandearah West vs Wangary — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wandearah West, South Australia and Wangary, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wandearah West has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wangary (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wandearah West or Wangary safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wandearah West has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Wangary scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wandearah West scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Wangary scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wandearah West or Wangary?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wandearah West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
